dialogos.texto_en: That's right.\nWhy don't we bring Raiha-chan along too?
Raiha too?
Yeah.\nShe'll be my sister eventually,\nso she's practically family already.
Ah, hmm, that's...right.
I agree! I fully support that!\nLet us cover Raiha-chan's travel expenses,\nUesugi-san!
We're the ones inviting her,\nso it's only natural that we cover her expenses.
Thanks, that's a big help.
It's fine, it's fine.
But still, you agreed so easily.\nTo think of her as family.
Hmm? Well, if we don't have that kind of resolve,\nit wouldn't satisfy you or the others.\nWould it, Nino?
That's true.
Um, Ichika?\nI'm sorry if this is none of my business, but%p-2;――
It might be a problem for your job as an actress\nif you have a significant other, right...?
Well, yes.\nThe boss warned me to be careful about that.
That's a difficult situation, isn't it?
How about you, Fu-kun?\nFeel about keeping it a secret, I mean.
I just don't want to burden Ichika with anything.\nThat's all.
Thank you, Futaro-kun.
I'm being cautious enough, but if we get exposed,\nI might not be able to continue working,\nso take responsibility.
Of course, I'll take responsibility.
She brought up the topic and now she's blushing like crazy.
I mean...
I was just joking, you know?\nI don't think it's that big of a deal.
Teehee...\nI like your spirit, Uesugi-san.
Don't tease me like that.\nI'm just stating the obvious, you know?
Alright, alright.\nIt seems like there's really no need to worry at all.
(Doesn't seem that they're worried about us.\n For now, it doesn't seem like my own anxieties\n are showing on the surface.)
(Surely there's no big problem between me and Ichika.\n But what if there is?)
(We haven't developed our relationship enough\n to the point where problems can arise...!)
(To be honest, things haven't really progressed much\n between me and Ichika since I confessed my feelings.)
(I had exams, and Ichika's work\n kept getting busier and busier. It was already\n a challenge just to find time to spend together.)
(Since I'm going to Tokyo, we'll be forced into\n a so-called long-distance relationship\n from here on out.)
(I'm not doubting Ichika's feelings!\n But I'm so new to this kind of relationship...\n Something feels off.)
(For that reason, I want to deepen my bond\n with Ichika on this trip even more...!)
(During this trip, I will KISS HER!!)
(She's kissed me before.\n This time, it's my turn...!)
(Show her the kind of man you are,\n Uesugi Futaro!!)
